prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名主校区约第28名，近年排名稳定在28–32名区间，学校层次高、品牌效应强。 2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及录取断档或投档线异常信号；抖音热度排名第55位（较热），短视频平台有一定关注度；2023年曾出现电信学部断档至60000名 的异常记录，但盘锦校区近年位次持续前移，未受明显冲击；依托大连理工大学主校区学科实力，化学工程与技术A+、力学A、土木工程A、机械工程A、管理科 学与工程A、软件工程A等，盘锦校区招生专业以能源化学工程（化工A+）、生物科学类、海洋技术等为主，学科底蕴深厚。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 盘锦校区招生专业多属化工、 生物、海洋、环境等方向，社会整体热度偏低（生化环材类明显劝退）；经济学类热度分化观望；本省2026年考生总数约20万（较2025年基本持平），物理类考生估算约14.36万 ，竞争环境稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅前移的强势趋势、2026年计划缩招约11%带来的竞争缓和、学校985层次与抖音较热度的吸 引力，以及专业热度偏低对报考的抑制作用，在2025年基准11742名基础上预计位次继续前移但幅度收窄；预测最低位次约10990名，区间10490–11490名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 生物科学类（盘锦）（生物信息学、生物科学）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 能源化学工程（盘锦）（含能源化学工程、化学工程与工业生物工程）
- 海洋技术（盘锦）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 经济学类（盘锦）（电子商务、经济学）
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间10490–11490名内，建议以二档能源化学工程（化工A+王牌）为主攻方向、一档生物科学类可冲刺、三档经济学类保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如10490以内） 可重点冲刺一档专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 14627 → 13818 → 14357 → 13240 → 11742, showing a fluctuating but forward-moving trend. In the last two years, it significantly improved from 13240 to 11742, with a cumulative forward shift of about 1498 places. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 11742. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 226 in 2021, 224 in 2022, 225 in 2023, 249 in 2024, and 234 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 208, a reduction of about 11% compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. The main campus ranks about 28th in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, with a stable range of 28–32 in recent years. The school has a high level and strong brand effect. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving abnormal signals of admission cutoffs or score line anomalies. It ranks 55th in Douyin popularity (relatively hot), with some attention on short video platforms. In 2023, there was an abnormal record of the School of Electronic Information and Electrical Engineering dropping to 60000, but the Panjin Campus rankings have been continuously moving forward in recent years, without significant impact. Relying on the main campus's disciplinary strength of Dalian University of Technology, with Chemical Engineering and Technology A+, Mechanics A, Civil Engineering A, Mechanical Engineering A, Management Science and Engineering A, Software Engineering A, etc., the Panjin Campus offers majors mainly in Energy Chemical Engineering (Chemical Engineering A+), Biological Sciences, Marine Technology, etc., with deep disciplinary foundations.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The majors offered at the Panjin Campus are mostly in chemical engineering, biology, marine, and environmental fields, with overall low social popularity (the 'biochem, environmental, materials' category is notably discouraged). The Economics category has mixed popularity and is being observed. In 2026, the total number of examinees in the province is about 200,000 (roughly the same as 2025), with an estimated 143,600 in the Physics Category, indicating a stable competitive environment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong forward-moving trend of the 2025 ranking, the easing of competition due to the approximately 11% enrollment reduction in 2026, the attraction of the 985 level and Douyin popularity, as well as the inhibitory effect of low major popularity on applications, based on the 2025 baseline of 11742, the ranking is expected to continue moving forward but with a narrower margin. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 10990, with a range of 10490–11490.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Biological Sciences (Panjin) (Bioinformatics, Biological Sciences)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Energy Chemical Engineering (Panjin) (including Energy Chemical Engineering, Chemical Engineering and Industrial Bioengineering)
- Marine Technology (Panjin)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Economics (Panjin) (E-commerce, Economics)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 10490–11490, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Energy Chemical Engineering (Chemical Engineering A+ flagship) as the main direction, with Tier 1 Biological Sciences as a reach, and Tier 3 Economics as a safety. For rankings significantly above the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 10490), focus on reaching for Tier 1 majors.
